nextPlan: Continuation condition: require CSI 300 and ChiNext to stop making new intraday lows and keep above MA20; otherwise stay defensive into 14:50.
Weak-to-strong rotation condition: only reduce a weaker holding if its MA20/MA60 repair fails and the target has a higher score, stronger sector logic, and does not raise portfolio concentration.
A candidate condition: no fresh A-class trade unless breadth can be verified and improves back toward at least the 45%-55% shock-market band.
B candidate condition: 300303 must hold MA60 near 9.51 or 600276 must hold above MA20 near 48.01 with relative strength; no add on fading candles.
C candidate condition: 510300 is only a small fallback if broad risk stabilizes; do not redeploy cash while CSI 300 ETF is still sliding intraday.
